ORDER ON DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CYRIL HACKETT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS HEREBY ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE, VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) SERVED BY DEFENDANT ON JULY 31, 2014. THE RESPONSES MUST BE SERVED UPON COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT CYRIL HACKETT WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER ON THIS MOTION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEK SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $650.00 IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (302).

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers And Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: appearances: Jamieson K. Fong, Esq., 510.457.3445, for defendant Cyril Hackett; no other appearances.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CYRIL HACKETT's Motion To Compel Answers And Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production is GRANTED. Plaintiff is hereby ORDERED to provide complete, verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) and Demand for Production (Set One) served by Defendant on July 31, 2014. The responses must be served upon counsel for Defendant CYRIL HACKETT within 15 days of service of Notice of Entry of the Order on this motion. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED, without prejudice to seek sanctions in the amount of $650.00 if Plaintiff fails to comply with this Order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported (302).
